effort_complexity.rationale: Narrow code surface with correctness-sensitive ref authority and provenance behaviour.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent operator sees exact committed owner-track slice state and provenance regardless of the launch worktree or documentation symlink layout.

validation.ratified_by: repository owner through the release orchestrator
positive_scenarios: A canonical docs symlink release reports the committed owner-track blocked verdict through aggregate and named board JSON.
A slice without an owner-track status falls back to the selected committed release source.
negative_scenarios: A farther ghost status on another track cannot override the owner verdict.
Dirty launch working-tree bytes cannot appear as Git-backed board authority.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Restoring owner-ref authority removes false lifecycle reports and lets release automation act on the exact committed verdict.

design_decisions.choice: Restore topology-derived owner-track status authority inside DiscoverCatalog.
options: owner track then selected release fallback
design_decisions.human_decision: Apply the already-ratified owner-track-first contract from issue #81.
design_decisions.rationale: The change reconciles #123 catalog discovery with the existing ownership authority rather than introducing a new architecture.
